compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Context
rebar should run deterministic workflows that mix scripted + agentic (LLM) steps,
defined as git-tracked text editable by both agents and humans, executed identically
from the library, CLI, and MCP server, drawing from a git-native prompt library with
evals, with a read-only rendered graph. Langflow is NOT adopted (engine/editor);
Langfuse is optional (OTLP trace sink only). Direction (A) approved; the plan reached an
Opus-APPROVED v3 after a 3-round review loop.

The deterministic gate's SECURITY (signing/attestation/protected-tags/trust-boundary) is
OUT OF SCOPE and tracked in epic 8a1c-fdaf-f57a-4104. Here the gate is an ordinary,
unsecured example step.

## Success Criteria
- Workflows are coordinate-free, schema-validated text (GitHub-Actions-style YAML),
  edited by agents+humans with clean git diffs.
- A thin linear in-process executor runs scripted+agentic steps across lib/CLI/MCP;
  run-state persists as events; execution is async over MCP.
- Git-native prompt library + evals; multi-provider per step; read-only graph render;
  dev/prod extras split with CI-enforced optionality.
- Stays a thin executor (Burr tripwire); no Langflow/Langfuse runtime dependency.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Workflow DSL + JSON Schema + reference-integrity linter; `rebar workflow new/validate/show`.
- [ ] Thin linear executor (graphlib) with run_id + idempotency, run-state as events, async over MCP.
- [ ] Agentic steps: generalized runner output_schema, hardened git-ref snapshot, scoped ticket tool, per-step provider.
- [ ] Prompts-as-files (resolve_prompt inverted) + Inspect/promptfoo eval seam.
- [ ] Read-only render; setup wizard; optionality CI; built-in example workflows; LangflowRunner retired.
- [ ] Module-size policy respected; Burr tripwire CI test in place.
compiled_state.title: LLM Workflow Engine: git-native, agent-editable workflows mixing scripted + agentic steps
